item.title: The ultimate lens flare
item.description: The Action Lab explores lens flare in a science experiment focused on light and physics.

media:content.media:title: The ultimate lens flare
media:content.media:description: The Action Lab explores lens flare in a science experiment focused on light and physics.

item.title: Can Pop Rocks carbonate soda?
item.description: In this video I see if it is possible to carbonate soda by adding 22 bags of pop rocks in it. First, in order to get my soda to have no carbonation and be completely flat, I put it in the vacuum chamber. Then I add the pop rocks to pressurize the soda with CO2 and see if it actually adds carbonation to the soda.

media:content.media:title: Can Pop Rocks carbonate soda?
media:content.media:description: In this video I see if it is possible to carbonate soda by adding 22 bags of pop rocks in it. First, in order to get my soda to have no carbonation and be completely flat, I put it in the vacuum chamber. Then I add the pop rocks to pressurize the soda with CO2 and see if it actually adds carbonation to the soda.

item.title: Does a syringe work in a vacuum?
item.description: Exploring how a syringe behaves in a vacuum

media:content.media:title: Does a syringe work in a vacuum?
media:content.media:description: Exploring how a syringe behaves in a vacuum

item.title: Feathers fall fast in a vacuum
item.description: I drop a feather in a vacuum chamber with no air to show how fast it falls

media:content.media:title: Feathers fall fast in a vacuum
media:content.media:description: I drop a feather in a vacuum chamber with no air to show how fast it falls

item.title: Is dust radioactive?
item.description: In this video I show you a method to qualitatively test for Radon gas and its daughter nucleotides in your house using a gieger counter and a vacuum cleaner to collect dust.

media:content.media:title: Is dust radioactive?
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you a method to qualitatively test for Radon gas and its daughter nucleotides in your house using a gieger counter and a vacuum cleaner to collect dust.

item.title: Why astronauts need heat shields
item.description: The real reason that astronauts need heat shields!

media:content.media:title: Why astronauts need heat shields
media:content.media:description: The real reason that astronauts need heat shields!

item.title: Falling into a black hole
item.description: In this video I show you what it actually looks like to drop different things into a black hole! I talk about gravitational lensing, gravitational time dilation and gravitational red shifting. All of this to show you what it would actually look like to watch something fall into a black hole.

media:content.media:title: Falling into a black hole
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you what it actually looks like to drop different things into a black hole! I talk about gravitational lensing, gravitational time dilation and gravitational red shifting. All of this to show you what it would actually look like to watch something fall into a black hole.

item.title: Powder reaction
item.description: Why a powder behaves this way in a simple science demonstration.
